messages: مرحبا أنا ساكن مستأجر جنبكم في Villette مددت رحلتي إلى الأربعاء والخروج في البرنامج يوم الاثنين من الشقة كلمت صاحب الشقة امدد إلى الاربعاء قال محجوزة عندي في البرنامج

لا معي عائلة 
٣ أفراد بالغين وطفلة ٥ سنوات ورضيعه اقل من سنه
أنا اجيك الساعة ١٢ ظهرا فما فوق
كيف أنا اتفقت معاك امس ودفعت المبلغ الزيادة
Hi omar i would like to ask for early check in please

And regarding the
1- towels and the bed sheets 
2- the housekeeper 
?
Ok brother no issue i will try to remind also
I will reach cairo around 4am in the morning i will be in the apartment around 7 am .if it’s possible for early check in please.🙏🏽

Hi again .just a reminder 
Regarding my early check in is it possible. Can you let me know as soon as possible please.🙏🏽
Ok great thanks in advance for everything. 🙏🏽
So is there a number to call you when I reach?
Ok great . Thanks in advance for everything again 🙏🏽❤️
Ok great thanks for everything. And i will let you know when i reach .

Hi omar

Good morning. I will check out on 11 am toady . Thanks for the hospitality and for everything you provided everything was perfect .and thanks again 👌🏽.

Hi omar 

Everything is ok with us . And thank you for asking 🙏🏽

Hi omar 
We where sleeping we just waked up i will take them now . Thanks brother 🙏🏽
لو سمحت ممكن يكون التسجيل الدخول مبكر

مرحبا كيفك
بس بسالك بخصوص الدخول اقدر اجي الساعه ١١:٣٠
شكررا ليك عمر بسالك فيه عندكم شقق للبيع على النيل
بعدين الشقه ليش كذا النت الاتصال زفت مره ولا فيه شبكه ابدا
بس مكتوب هنا لحد اذا دفعت لحد الساعه ٦
Hello, is it possible for me to book here today? I know it is super short notice. I have $ cash only and my old apartment told me to leave
Can we come in 2 hours ? I got a card to pay with
We want to come now. We can wait till it’s open
We want an early check in please
We’re trying to open the door
I was trying to open the door but it’s been resolved now
Hii good afternoon. Thank you so much! The apartment is beautiful
Hi good morning. We are checking out today by 9m as our flight is by 1am
